channel.title: The Executive Branch on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in The Executive Branch on Maharlikanism

item.title: The Office Of the President
item.description:
Chief Of Staff

This is an Assistant to the President. He or she is the most critical to implementation of the President’s vision for the country.

The chief also has a dual role as manager of the staffs of the Office of the President.5

item.title: The Office Of Communications
item.description:
This operates under the Director of Communications.

It conveys the President’s agenda to the public through various media, including speeches and remarks, press briefings, off-the-record discussions with reporters, and social media.

item.title: The Office Of Communications
item.description:
Office Of Legislative Affairs (OLA)

This is the liaison between the Executive and the Legislative.

The President must work with congressional leaders to ensure presidential nominees, for roles such as Cabinet secretaries and ambassadors, are confirmed by the Senate.
